notes: Uses RAC and geometric descriptors extracted from MOFSimplify full_SSD_data.csv.
Run descriptor baselines only on the fixed MOFSimplify train/val/test split.
Preferred token route is formula or linker/metal tokenization from a structure-derived representation.
Do not use CoRE refcodes as a proxy tokenization baseline; that would be identifier leakage, not chemistry.
blockers: Mapped route does not yet provide reliable formula or linker token fields.

notes: core_mof_id coverage is 2179/2179; schema is ready for later CoRE-MOF structure fetch.
Graph baseline should only start after a reproducible CIF-to-graph extraction path is added.

evaluation_protocol.split_policy: Use the fixed MOFSimplify train/val/test partition shipped with the source dataset.
evaluation_protocol.falsification_rule: Reject the H10 claim if graph models fail to outperform simpler baselines on a defensible proxy target or if the target labels cannot be justified scientifically.

warnings: Token baseline remains blocked until chemistry-derived token fields are added.
Do not compare graph models against descriptor baselines on different splits.
